page.c: "Your chess is insane." Hikaru said, as he slipped his feminine hand into &&Magnus&& s pants and smirked. "Are you trying to mate me?" protests &&Magnus&&  as Hikaru blushes, the boyish figure undressed before &&Magnus&&  "Weak tempo play, Hikaru." The two kissed, deeply and passionately, and afterwards &&Magnus&& places his Rook into Hikarus open line.
